name: My arm got crushed by a press at work, do I qualify for workers comp?
description: Yes, machine injuries at work during duties qualify for workers comp[1][4].

mainEntity.name: My arm got crushed by a press at work, do I qualify for workers comp?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, machine injuries at work during duties qualify for workers comp[1][4].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, if the injury happened during job duties on company time.** Workers' comp covers machine accidents arising out of employment, even routine tasks[1][4]. Pre-existing issues don't disqualify if work aggravated them. **Key factors:** Must be reported timely; employer can't retaliate. **Practical guidance:** File claim via employer; track medical records. Get legal help if denied. This applies nationwide including Utah[1].
